zh.lifeSummary: Anna Jäger於大約1532年出生在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 蓋斯林根蓋斯林根 安 德 斯泰。她於1552年與Paulus Panthaleon在德國爾特波格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1589年4月24日享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Jäger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernhard, Dieter, Gunter, Hans, Irmgard, Kurt, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.

German (also Jäger) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; Jäger); Dutch: occupational name for a hunter, from Middle High German jeger(e), Middle Low German jeger(e), Middle Dutch jagher ‘hunter’. See also Jaeger , compare Yager and Yauger .

Slovenian; Slovak (mainly Jáger, also Jäger): occupational name for a hunter, from jager (Slovak jáger), a colloquial loanword from Middle High German (see Jaeger ). This surname is also found in Czechia (also Jáger) and Croatia. Compare Yager .

variants.name: Jaeger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Friedrich, Klaus, Fritz, Armin, Erwin, Helmut, Ralf, Alois, Gerhard.

German (mainly Jäger) and Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Jäger): occupational name for a hunter, from Middle High German jeger(e), Middle Low German jeger(e) (agent derivatives of jagen ‘to hunt’); as a Jewish surname, it is mainly artificial, derived from German Jäger. The surname is also established in Scandinavia (Swedish Jäger; Danish and Norwegian Jæger). Compare Jager 1, Yaeger , and Yeager .

variants.name: Jagers
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Karlheinz, Kurt.

variants.name: De Jager
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Anders, Gerrit, Dirk, Durk, Huibert, Johan.
Dutch: variant of Jager ‘hunter’, with the definite article de ‘the’. The surname De Jager is also established in South Africa.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Jäger was born about 1532, in Geislingen an der Steige, Oberamt Geislingen, Württemberg, Germany. She married Paulus Panthaleon in 1552, in Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 24 April 1589, at the age of 58.

ko.Geislingen, Donau, Wrtt: 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 그이슬링 그이슬링 앤 데르 스테익

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Jäger(은)는 대략 1532년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 그이슬링 그이슬링 앤 데르 스테익에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1552년 독일 wu르테버그에서 Paulus Panthaleon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1589년 4월 24일 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Jäger родилась около 1532 г. в местности джислинген ан дир стидж, обирамт джислинген, вuрттембирг, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Paulus Panthaleon в 1552 г. в местности вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 24 апреля 1589 г. в возрасте 58 лет.
